mapper.select: SELECT user_id, login_id, email, password, provider, provider_user_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM sprout_user WHERE login_id = #{loginId} AND provider = #{provider} AND is_active = true
SELECT user_id, login_id, email, password, provider, provider_user_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM sprout_user WHERE email = #{email} AND provider = #{provider} AND is_active = true
SELECT user_id, login_id, email, password, provider, provider_user_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at FROM sprout_user WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sprout_user ( login_id, email, password, provider, provider_user_id, is_active, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{loginId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{provider}, #{providerUserId}, #{isActive}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
